visuals.title: System Call Execution Flow
visuals.description: Visual diagram for System Call Execution Flow
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Operating System Services</text>
  
  <!-- Central OS Core -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="175" r="50" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    OS Kernel
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Process Management -->
  <rect x="80" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="130" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Process Management
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- File System -->
  <rect x="240" y="80" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    File System
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Memory Management -->
  <rect x="80" y="250" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="130" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Memory Management
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- I/O System -->
  <rect x="240" y="250" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="290" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    I/O System
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrows connecting services to OS core -->
  <line x1="130" y1="120" x2="190" y2="155" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="290" y1="120" x2="230" y2="155" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="130" y1="250" x2="190" y2="195" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="290" y1="250" x2="230" y2="195" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
